channel.title: Perioskoup Blog
channel.description: Insights on periodontal health, AI in dentistry, and patient engagement from the Perioskoup team.

item.title: The 3-Minute Daily Routine That Could Save Your Teeth
item.description: Most people spend more time choosing what to watch on Netflix than caring for their teeth. Here's a clinically-backed 3-minute routine that actually works.
item.author: hello@perioskoup.com (Dr. Anca Laura Constantin)

item.title: How AI Is Changing Dental Monitoring - And Why It Matters
item.description: From pattern recognition in X-rays to personalised habit coaching, AI is beginning to close the gap between clinical visits. Here's what's real and what's hype.
item.author: hello@perioskoup.com (Eduard Ciugulea)

item.title: What Is Periodontal Disease? A Patient's Complete Guide
item.description: Periodontal disease affects more than half of adults over 30, yet most people have never heard the word 'periodontist'. Here's everything you need to know.
item.author: hello@perioskoup.com (Dr. Anca Laura Constantin)

item.title: Why Patients Forget Dental Instructions (And What to Do About It)
item.description: Research consistently shows that patients forget up to 80% of what they are told in a clinical consultation within 24 hours. This is not a patient failure - it is a systems failure.
item.author: hello@perioskoup.com (Dr. Anca Laura Constantin)

item.title: Building the Bridge: The Perioskoup Story
item.description: Every startup begins with a problem that someone couldn't stop thinking about. For Perioskoup, that problem was the gap between the dental chair and the patient's daily life.
item.author: hello@perioskoup.com (Dr. Anca Laura Constantin)

item.title: Perioskoup Wins EFP Digital Innovation Award 2025
item.description: At EuroPerio11 in Vienna, Perioskoup was awarded 3rd Prize at the EFP Digital Innovation Awards - selected from 20 submissions across 17 national societies.
item.author: hello@perioskoup.com (Eduard Ciugulea)
